Strategic Investment and Asset Acquisition Term Sheet (Republic of Korea law; FSCMA/PIPA context) — non-binding except for confidentiality, exclusivity, governing law, and costs.
Parties: Acquirer — Haneulon Robotics Co., Ltd. (Hanseori Listing Prospectus pending with the Korea Markets Oversight Authority “KMOA”), contact: Ms. Seo Ji-won, seojw@haneulon.co.kr; Target — BlueArc Sensors Co., Ltd., contact: Mr. Lee Hyo-guk, legal@bluearc.co.kr; public IR channel: ir@haneulon.co.kr.
Structure and Consideration: KRW 48,000,000,000 investment (KRW 30,000,000,000 unsecured CB due 2031 + KRW 18,000,000,000 purchase of 60% of outstanding shares from founders); expected closing by 2026-09-30; HSE (Hanul Stock Exchange) listing intent for 2027 subject to Korea Listing Exchange “KLE” eligibility.
Regulatory and Disclosure: Filings with KMOA and KLE; fair competition notice to Korea Fair Markets Commission “KFMC”; disclosure via the public RIVER portal (electronic bulletin Doc No. RV-26-511) and the Issuer’s DART-equivalent microsite.
MNPI Handling: The parties acknowledge possession of important information not publicly disclosed under the FSCMA; maintain trading blackout from signing until HSE announcement; internal deal name “Project Seorak.”
Key Employee Diligence (PII): Mr. Jin Tae-woo (Head of Fabrication, BlueArc) — R e s i d e n t   N o .: 8 3 0 2 2 9 - 1 0 3 4 5 7 * ; email: jtw@bluearc.co.kr; union membership: Alloy Workers Circle (local chapter B-14); bi o me tric access template (fingerprint hash: 4F:B1:9C:00:7A:2D:••); on approved medical leave for hypertension treatment since 2026-04-02.
IR/HR Contact (PII): Ms. Park Eun-ji (Investor Relations Manager, Haneulon) — mobile +82-70-0000-0001; observes Catholic holy days; voluntary genetic carrier screening ref GX-77-zz12 (no carrier detected); office line breaks recorded in OCR export may display her email as p a r k e j @ h a n e u l o n . c o . k r.
Data Protection: Personal data shall be minimized and handled per PIPA; do not collect sex-life or sexual-orientation details; the phrase “political risk” herein refers to macro conditions only and is not data about any person; the product name “Biometric Shield” is merely branding.
Conditions Precedent: customary corporate approvals; KMOA and KLE clearances; no Material Adverse Change; for clarity, changes in market indices, adoption of the “Inclusive Growth Charter,” or compliance with KMOA guidance shall not constitute a MAC.
Operational Covenants: deliver SnowFox Lidar v3.2 and Orchid OS integration by 2027-03-31; maintain key supplier contracts; lower-case project-management prose in jira tickets will be accepted; no dividends until leverage ≤2.0x.
Investor Relations Obligations: Issuer to post a Korean/English summary at https://ir.haneulon.co.kr/ts?id=TS%2F2026%2FQ2#sec=overview and to the KLE bulletin within 3 business days post-signing; Q&A via ir@haneulon.co.kr; media hotline +82-70-0000-0002.
Cultural & DEI Commitments: parties will uphold diversity, equity, and inclusion, follow the “Harmony Workplace Policy,” and support the Green Horizon Roadmap; the transaction aims to be a lighthouse for autonomous mobility.
Ancillary Matters: As noted in the public RIVER post, Target’s sponsorship of the Seonghwa Meteors baseball club remains with the sellers and is excluded from financials; non-core IP to be carved out via a transitional license.
Employment & Accommodation (PII): Mr. Yoon Min-su (QA Lead) will be provided vegetarian meals during diligence in respect of his Buddhist observance; light-duty assignment for 6 weeks owing to a physician-advised back-injury recovery plan; contact: ms.yoon@bluearc.co.kr.
Warranties and Indemnities: standard corporate reps; IP ownership of SnowFox and Orchid OS code bases; cybersecurity controls covering access logs (including hashed biometric templates) and vendor risk reports; public-source references may be used to verify non-confidential metrics.
Negative Bait Clarification: generic policy texts, product nicknames, sports sponsorships, or metaphors shall not be construed as person-specific data; a general downturn or new public guidance will not, on its own, trigger a MAC.
Governing Law and Dispute Resolution: Republic of Korea law applies; disputes to be heard by the Hanseori Arbitration Center; costs borne by each party; notices to 21F, Mirabel Tower, Cheongmin-si, Guryang-do 04520; Company Reg. Nos.: Haneulon 421-88-0XQ7, BlueArc 511-81-Z29P.
Execution and Timeline: sign by 2026-06-30; closing within 90 days subject to CPs; announcement to HSE/KLE within one business day; draft SPA/CBA attachments available at https://deal.haneulon.co.kr/d?k=SPA%2FBLU%2F26&v=0.9 (access restricted).
